CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Aug-31-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Houghton Mifflin Company
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Tuttle of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff Whitney Leeman.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Houghton Mifflin Company is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
